fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifierReason [ fhir:v "If true this element negates the specified action. For example, instead of a request for a procedure, it is a request for the procedure to not occur." ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.description" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Extra info describing activity to perform" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "This provides a textual description of constraints on the intended activity occurrence, including relation to other activities.  It may also include objectives, pre-conditions and end-conditions.  Finally, it may convey specifics about the activity such as body site, method, route, etc." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:chemotherapy" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "chemotherapy" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Action to occur as part of plan" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Identifies a planned action to occur as part of the plan.  For example, a medication to be used, lab tests to perform, self-monitoring, education, etc." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Allows systems to prompt for performance of planned activities, and validate plans against best practice." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity" ] ;

fhir:expression [ fhir:v "detail.empty() or reference.empty()" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "not(exists(f:detail)) or not(exists(f:reference))" ] ;

fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the element and that modifies the understanding of the element in which it is contained and/or the understanding of the containing element's descendants. Usually modifier elements provide negation or qualification. To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension. Applications processing a resource are required to check for modifier extensions.\n\nModifier extensions SHALL NOT change the meaning of any elements on Resource or DomainResource (including cannot change the meaning of modifierExtension itself)." ] ;

fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Modifier extensions allow for extensions that *cannot* be safely ignored to be clearly distinguished from the vast majority of extensions which can be safely ignored. fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:chemotherapy.outcomeCodeableConcept" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.outcomeCodeableConcept" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Results of the activity" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Identifies the outcome at the point when the status of the activity is assessed.  For example, the outcome of an education activity could be patient understands (or not)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Note that this should not duplicate the activity status (e.g. completed or in progress)." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;

        ( fhir:extension [

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName>           ] ;
fhir:value [
a fhir:String ;
fhir:v "CarePlanActivityOutcome"           ]         ] ) ;
fhir:strength [ fhir:v "example" ] ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "Identifies the results of the activity." ] ;
fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/care-plan-activity-outcome|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/care-plan-activity-outcome?version=4.0.1>         ]       ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:chemotherapy.outcomeReference" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.outcomeReference" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Appointment, Encounter, Procedure, etc." ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Details of the outcome or action resulting from the activity.  The reference to an \"event\" resource, such as Procedure or Encounter or Observation, is the result/outcome of the activity itself.  The activity can be conveyed using CarePlan.activity.detail OR using the CarePlan.activity.reference (a reference to a “request” resource)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The activity outcome is independent of the outcome of the related goal(s).  For example, if the goal is to achieve a target body weight of 150 lbs and an activity is defined to diet, then the activity outcome could be calories consumed whereas the goal outcome is an observation for the actual body weight measured." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Links plan to resulting actions." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.outcomeReference" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;

fhir:code [
fhir:v "Reference"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:Reference         ] ;

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource?version=4.0.1>         ] )       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;

fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "workflow" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "{Event that is outcome of Request in activity.reference}" ]       ] [

fhir:map [ fhir:v ".inboundRelationship[typeCode=FLFS].source" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:chemotherapy.progress" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.progress" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Comments about the activity status/progress" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Notes about the adherence/status/progress of the activity." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This element should NOT be used to describe the activity to be performed - that occurs either within the resource pointed to by activity.detail.reference or in activity.detail.description." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Can be used to capture information about adherence, progress, concerns, etc." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.progress" ] ;

fhir:l fhir:Annotation         ]       ] ) ;

fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

fhir:source [

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;

fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;

fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "NTE?" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".inboundRelationship[typeCode=SUBJ].source[classCode=OBS, moodCode=EVN, code=\"annotation\"].value" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:chemotherapy.reference" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.reference" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Activity details defined in specific resource" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The details of the proposed activity represented in a specific resource." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Standard extension exists ([resource-pertainsToGoal](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/extension-resource-pertainstogoal.html)) that allows goals to be referenced from any of the referenced resources in CarePlan.activity.reference.  \rThe goal should be visible when the resource referenced by CarePlan.activity.reference is viewed independently from the CarePlan.  Requests that are pointed to by a CarePlan using this element should *not* point to this CarePlan using the \"basedOn\" element.  i.e. Requests that are part of a CarePlan are not \"based on\" the CarePlan." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Details in a form consistent with other applications and contexts of use." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.reference" ] ;

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/NutritionOrder?version=4.0.1>         ] [

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Task?version=4.0.1>         ] [

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A description of the kind of resource the in-line definition of a care plan activity is representing.  The CarePlan.activity.detail is an in-line definition when a resource is not referenced using CarePlan.activity.reference.  For example, a MedicationRequest, a ServiceRequest, or a CommunicationRequest." ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Detailed description of the type of planned activity; e.g. what lab test, what procedure, what kind of encounter." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Aus dotbase: 'Chemotherapie' (choice)" ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Allows matching performed to planned as well as validation against protocols." ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.reasonCode" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Why activity should be done or why activity was prohibited" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Provides the rationale that drove the inclusion of this particular activity as part of the plan or the reason why the activity was prohibited." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This could be a diagnosis code.  If a full condition record exists or additional detail is needed, use reasonCondition instead." ] ;

a fhir:String ;
fhir:v "CarePlanActivityReason"           ]         ] ) ;
fhir:strength [ fhir:v "example" ] ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "Identifies why a care plan activity is needed.  Can include any health condition codes as well as such concepts as \"general wellness\", prophylaxis, surgical preparation, etc." ] ;
fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/clinical-findings|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/clinical-findings?version=4.0.1>         ]       ] ;

fhir:identity [ fhir:v "workflow" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Request.reasonCode" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:chemotherapy.detail.reasonReference" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.reasonReference" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Why activity is needed" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Indicates another resource, such as the health condition(s), whose existence justifies this request and drove the inclusion of this particular activity as part of the plan." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Conditions can be identified at the activity level that are not identified as reasons for the overall plan." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
fhir:base [

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.goal" ] ;

fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;

fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;

      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".outboundRelationship[typeCode<=OBJ]." ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:chemotherapy.detail.status" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.status" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "not-started | scheduled | in-progress | on-hold | completed | cancelled | stopped | unknown | entered-in-error" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Identifies what progress is being made for the specific activity." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Some aspects of status can be inferred based on the resources linked in actionTaken.  Note that \"status\" is only as current as the plan was most recently updated.  \nThe unknown code is not to be used to convey other statuses.  The unknown code should be used when one of the statuses applies, but the authoring system doesn't know the current state of the activity." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Indicates progress against the plan, whether the activity is still relevant for the plan." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.status" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "code"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:code         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifierReason [ fhir:v "This element is labelled as a modifier because it is a status element that contains status entered-in-error which means that the activity should not be treated as valid" ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:binding [
        ( fhir:extension [
fhir:url [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName>           ] ;
fhir:value [
a fhir:String ;
fhir:v "CarePlanActivityStatus"           ]         ] ) ;
fhir:strength [ fhir:v "required" ] ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "Codes that reflect the current state of a care plan activity within its overall life cycle." ] ;
fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/care-plan-activity-status|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/care-plan-activity-status?version=4.0.1>         ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [

fhir:map [ fhir:v "Request.status" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "ORC-5?" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".statusCode not-started = new scheduled = not-started (and fulfillment relationship to appointent) in-progress = active on-hold = suspended completed = completed cancelled = aborted" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:chemotherapy.detail.statusReason" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.statusReason" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Reason for current status" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Provides reason why the activity isn't yet started, is on hold, was cancelled, etc." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Will generally not be present if status is \"complete\".  Be sure to prompt to update this (or at least remove the existing value) if the status is changed." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.statusReason" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;

fhir:code [
fhir:v "CodeableConcept"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:CodeableConcept         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;

fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;

fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "workflow" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Request.statusReason" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:chemotherapy.detail.doNotPerform" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.doNotPerform" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "If true, activity is prohibiting action" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "If true, indicates that the described activity is one that must NOT be engaged in when following the plan.  If false, or missing, indicates that the described activity is one that should be engaged in when following the plan." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This element is labeled as a modifier because it marks an activity as an activity that is not to be performed." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Captures intention to not do something that may have been previously typical." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.doNotPerform" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "boolean"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:boolean         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:meaningWhenMissing [ fhir:v "If missing indicates that the described activity is one that should be engaged in when following the plan." ] ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;

fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifierReason [ fhir:v "If true this element negates the specified action. For example, instead of a request for a procedure, it is a request for the procedure to not occur." ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.description" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Extra info describing activity to perform" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "This provides a textual description of constraints on the intended activity occurrence, including relation to other activities.  It may also include objectives, pre-conditions and end-conditions.  Finally, it may convey specifics about the activity such as body site, method, route, etc." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "radiotherapy" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Action to occur as part of plan" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Identifies a planned action to occur as part of the plan.  For example, a medication to be used, lab tests to perform, self-monitoring, education, etc." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Allows systems to prompt for performance of planned activities, and validate plans against best practice." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "not(exists(f:detail)) or not(exists(f:reference))" ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the element and that modifies the understanding of the element in which it is contained and/or the understanding of the containing element's descendants. Usually modifier elements provide negation or qualification. To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension. Applications processing a resource are required to check for modifier extensions.\n\nModifier extensions SHALL NOT change the meaning of any elements on Resource or DomainResource (including cannot change the meaning of modifierExtension itself)." ] ;

fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Modifier extensions allow for extensions that *cannot* be safely ignored to be clearly distinguished from the vast majority of extensions which can be safely ignored. fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:radiotherapy.outcomeCodeableConcept" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.outcomeCodeableConcept" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Results of the activity" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Identifies the outcome at the point when the status of the activity is assessed.  For example, the outcome of an education activity could be patient understands (or not)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Note that this should not duplicate the activity status (e.g. completed or in progress)." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;

        ( fhir:extension [

fhir:value [
a fhir:String ;
fhir:v "CarePlanActivityOutcome"           ]         ] ) ;
fhir:strength [ fhir:v "example" ] ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "Identifies the results of the activity." ] ;
fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/care-plan-activity-outcome|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/care-plan-activity-outcome?version=4.0.1>         ]       ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:radiotherapy.outcomeReference" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.outcomeReference" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Appointment, Encounter, Procedure, etc." ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Details of the outcome or action resulting from the activity.  The reference to an \"event\" resource, such as Procedure or Encounter or Observation, is the result/outcome of the activity itself.  The activity can be conveyed using CarePlan.activity.detail OR using the CarePlan.activity.reference (a reference to a “request” resource)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The activity outcome is independent of the outcome of the related goal(s).  For example, if the goal is to achieve a target body weight of 150 lbs and an activity is defined to diet, then the activity outcome could be calories consumed whereas the goal outcome is an observation for the actual body weight measured." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Links plan to resulting actions." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.outcomeReference" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;

fhir:code [

fhir:l fhir:Reference         ] ;

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource?version=4.0.1>         ] )       ] ) ;

fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;

fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "workflow" ] ;

fhir:map [ fhir:v ".inboundRelationship[typeCode=FLFS].source" ]       ] )     ] [

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.progress" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Comments about the activity status/progress" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Notes about the adherence/status/progress of the activity." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This element should NOT be used to describe the activity to be performed - that occurs either within the resource pointed to by activity.detail.reference or in activity.detail.description." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Can be used to capture information about adherence, progress, concerns, etc." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;

fhir:map [ fhir:v "NTE?" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".inboundRelationship[typeCode=SUBJ].source[classCode=OBS, moodCode=EVN, code=\"annotation\"].value" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:radiotherapy.reference" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.reference" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Activity details defined in specific resource" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The details of the proposed activity represented in a specific resource." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Standard extension exists ([resource-pertainsToGoal](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/extension-resource-pertainstogoal.html)) that allows goals to be referenced from any of the referenced resources in CarePlan.activity.reference.  \rThe goal should be visible when the resource referenced by CarePlan.activity.reference is viewed independently from the CarePlan.  Requests that are pointed to by a CarePlan using this element should *not* point to this CarePlan using the \"basedOn\" element.  i.e. Requests that are part of a CarePlan are not \"based on\" the CarePlan." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Details in a form consistent with other applications and contexts of use." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.reference" ] ;

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/CommunicationRequest?version=4.0.1>         ] [

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/DeviceRequest?version=4.0.1>         ] [

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/MedicationRequest?version=4.0.1>         ] [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/NutritionOrder|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/NutritionOrder?version=4.0.1>         ] [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Task|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Task?version=4.0.1>         ] [

fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;

fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;

fhir:map [ fhir:v ".outboundRelationship[typeCode=COMP].target" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:radiotherapy.detail" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "In-line definition of activity" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A simple summary of a planned activity suitable for a general care plan system (e.g. form driven) that doesn't know about specific resources such as procedure etc." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Details in a simple form for generic care plan systems." ] ;

Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension. fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A description of the kind of resource the in-line definition of a care plan activity is representing.  The CarePlan.activity.detail is an in-line definition when a resource is not referenced using CarePlan.activity.reference.  For example, a MedicationRequest, a ServiceRequest, or a CommunicationRequest." ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The URL pointing to a FHIR-defined protocol, guideline, questionnaire or other definition that is adhered to in whole or in part by this CarePlan activity." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Allows Questionnaires that the patient (or practitioner) should fill in to fulfill the care plan activity." ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The URL pointing to an externally maintained protocol, guideline, questionnaire or other definition that is adhered to in whole or in part by this CarePlan activity." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This might be an HTML page, PDF, etc. or could just be a non-resolvable URI identifier." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Allows Questionnaires that the patient (or practitioner) should fill in to fulfill the care plan activity." ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.code" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Empfohlene Strahlentherapie" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Detailed description of the type of planned activity; e.g. what lab test, what procedure, what kind of encounter." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Aus dotbase: 'Strahlentherapie' (choice)" ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Allows matching performed to planned as well as validation against protocols." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

a sct:108290001 ;

fhir:code [ fhir:v "108290001" ] ;
fhir:display [ fhir:v "Radiation oncology AND/OR radiotherapy (procedure)" ]         ] )       ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.reasonCode" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Why activity should be done or why activity was prohibited" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Provides the rationale that drove the inclusion of this particular activity as part of the plan or the reason why the activity was prohibited." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This could be a diagnosis code.  If a full condition record exists or additional detail is needed, use reasonCondition instead." ] ;

a fhir:String ;
fhir:v "CarePlanActivityReason"           ]         ] ) ;
fhir:strength [ fhir:v "example" ] ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "Identifies why a care plan activity is needed.  Can include any health condition codes as well as such concepts as \"general wellness\", prophylaxis, surgical preparation, etc." ] ;
fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/clinical-findings|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/clinical-findings?version=4.0.1>         ]       ] ;

fhir:map [ fhir:v "Request.reasonCode" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:radiotherapy.detail.reasonReference" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.reasonReference" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Why activity is needed" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Indicates another resource, such as the health condition(s), whose existence justifies this request and drove the inclusion of this particular activity as part of the plan." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Conditions can be identified at the activity level that are not identified as reasons for the overall plan." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
fhir:base [

fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;

fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

fhir:source [

fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;

fhir:identity [ fhir:v "workflow" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Request.reasonReference" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:radiotherapy.detail.goal" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.goal" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Goals this activity relates to" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Internal reference that identifies the goals that this activity is intended to contribute towards meeting." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "So that participants know the link explicitly." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.goal" ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;

fhir:code [
fhir:v "Reference"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:Reference         ] ;

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Goal?version=4.0.1>         ] )       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;

      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".outboundRelationship[typeCode<=OBJ]." ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:radiotherapy.detail.status" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.status" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "not-started | scheduled | in-progress | on-hold | completed | cancelled | stopped | unknown | entered-in-error" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Identifies what progress is being made for the specific activity." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Some aspects of status can be inferred based on the resources linked in actionTaken.  Note that \"status\" is only as current as the plan was most recently updated.  \nThe unknown code is not to be used to convey other statuses.  The unknown code should be used when one of the statuses applies, but the authoring system doesn't know the current state of the activity." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Indicates progress against the plan, whether the activity is still relevant for the plan." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.status" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "code"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:code         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifierReason [ fhir:v "This element is labelled as a modifier because it is a status element that contains status entered-in-error which means that the activity should not be treated as valid" ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:binding [
        ( fhir:extension [
fhir:url [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName>           ] ;
fhir:value [
a fhir:String ;
fhir:v "CarePlanActivityStatus"           ]         ] ) ;
fhir:strength [ fhir:v "required" ] ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "Codes that reflect the current state of a care plan activity within its overall life cycle." ] ;
fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/care-plan-activity-status|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/care-plan-activity-status?version=4.0.1>         ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "workflow" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Request.status" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "ORC-5?" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".statusCode not-started = new scheduled = not-started (and fulfillment relationship to appointent) in-progress = active on-hold = suspended completed = completed cancelled = aborted" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:radiotherapy.detail.statusReason" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.statusReason" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Reason for current status" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Provides reason why the activity isn't yet started, is on hold, was cancelled, etc." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Will generally not be present if status is \"complete\".  Be sure to prompt to update this (or at least remove the existing value) if the status is changed." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.statusReason" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;

fhir:code [
fhir:v "CodeableConcept"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:CodeableConcept         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;

fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "workflow" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Request.statusReason" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:radiotherapy.detail.doNotPerform" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.doNotPerform" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "If true, activity is prohibiting action" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "If true, indicates that the described activity is one that must NOT be engaged in when following the plan.  If false, or missing, indicates that the described activity is one that should be engaged in when following the plan." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This element is labeled as a modifier because it marks an activity as an activity that is not to be performed." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Captures intention to not do something that may have been previously typical." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.doNotPerform" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "boolean"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:boolean         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:meaningWhenMissing [ fhir:v "If missing indicates that the described activity is one that should be engaged in when following the plan." ] ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifierReason [ fhir:v "If true this element negates the specified action. For example, instead of a request for a procedure, it is a request for the procedure to not occur." ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The period, timing or frequency upon which the described activity is to occur." ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "This provides a textual description of constraints on the intended activity occurrence, including relation to other activities.  It may also include objectives, pre-conditions and end-conditions.  Finally, it may convey specifics about the activity such as body site, method, route, etc." ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Identifies a planned action to occur as part of the plan.  For example, a medication to be used, lab tests to perform, self-monitoring, education, etc." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Allows systems to prompt for performance of planned activities, and validate plans against best practice." ] ;

fhir:short [ fhir:v "Results of the activity" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Identifies the outcome at the point when the status of the activity is assessed.  For example, the outcome of an education activity could be patient understands (or not)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Note that this should not duplicate the activity status (e.g. completed or in progress)." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;

a fhir:String ;

fhir:description [ fhir:v "Identifies the results of the activity." ] ;
fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/care-plan-activity-outcome|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/care-plan-activity-outcome?version=4.0.1>         ]       ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:endocrineTherapy.outcomeReference" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.outcomeReference" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Appointment, Encounter, Procedure, etc." ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Details of the outcome or action resulting from the activity.  The reference to an \"event\" resource, such as Procedure or Encounter or Observation, is the result/outcome of the activity itself.  The activity can be conveyed using CarePlan.activity.detail OR using the CarePlan.activity.reference (a reference to a “request” resource)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The activity outcome is independent of the outcome of the related goal(s).  For example, if the goal is to achieve a target body weight of 150 lbs and an activity is defined to diet, then the activity outcome could be calories consumed whereas the goal outcome is an observation for the actual body weight measured." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Links plan to resulting actions." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.outcomeReference" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.reference" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Activity details defined in specific resource" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The details of the proposed activity represented in a specific resource." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Standard extension exists ([resource-pertainsToGoal](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/extension-resource-pertainstogoal.html)) that allows goals to be referenced from any of the referenced resources in CarePlan.activity.reference.  \rThe goal should be visible when the resource referenced by CarePlan.activity.reference is viewed independently from the CarePlan.  Requests that are pointed to by a CarePlan using this element should *not* point to this CarePlan using the \"basedOn\" element.  i.e. Requests that are part of a CarePlan are not \"based on\" the CarePlan." ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "In-line definition of activity" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A simple summary of a planned activity suitable for a general care plan system (e.g. form driven) that doesn't know about specific resources such as procedure etc." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Details in a simple form for generic care plan systems." ] ;

      ( fhir:condition [ fhir:v "cpl-3" ] ) ;

fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Indicates another resource, such as the health condition(s), whose existence justifies this request and drove the inclusion of this particular activity as part of the plan." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Conditions can be identified at the activity level that are not identified as reasons for the overall plan." ] ;

fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:endocrineTherapy.detail.status" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.status" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "not-started | scheduled | in-progress | on-hold | completed | cancelled | stopped | unknown | entered-in-error" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Identifies what progress is being made for the specific activity." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Some aspects of status can be inferred based on the resources linked in actionTaken.  Note that \"status\" is only as current as the plan was most recently updated.  \nThe unknown code is not to be used to convey other statuses.  The unknown code should be used when one of the statuses applies, but the authoring system doesn't know the current state of the activity." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Indicates progress against the plan, whether the activity is still relevant for the plan." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.status" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "code"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:code         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;

fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifierReason [ fhir:v "This element is labelled as a modifier because it is a status element that contains status entered-in-error which means that the activity should not be treated as valid" ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:binding [
        ( fhir:extension [
fhir:url [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName>           ] ;
fhir:value [
a fhir:String ;
fhir:v "CarePlanActivityStatus"           ]         ] ) ;
fhir:strength [ fhir:v "required" ] ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "Codes that reflect the current state of a care plan activity within its overall life cycle." ] ;
fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/care-plan-activity-status|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/care-plan-activity-status?version=4.0.1>         ]       ] ;

fhir:identity [ fhir:v "workflow" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Request.status" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "ORC-5?" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".statusCode not-started = new scheduled = not-started (and fulfillment relationship to appointent) in-progress = active on-hold = suspended completed = completed cancelled = aborted" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:endocrineTherapy.detail.statusReason" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.statusReason" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Reason for current status" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Provides reason why the activity isn't yet started, is on hold, was cancelled, etc." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Will generally not be present if status is \"complete\".  Be sure to prompt to update this (or at least remove the existing value) if the status is changed." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.statusReason" ] ;

fhir:code [
fhir:v "CodeableConcept"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:CodeableConcept         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;

fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "workflow" ] ;

fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:endocrineTherapy.detail.doNotPerform" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.doNotPerform" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "If true, activity is prohibiting action" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "If true, indicates that the described activity is one that must NOT be engaged in when following the plan.  If false, or missing, indicates that the described activity is one that should be engaged in when following the plan." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This element is labeled as a modifier because it marks an activity as an activity that is not to be performed." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Captures intention to not do something that may have been previously typical." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.doNotPerform" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "boolean"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:boolean         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:meaningWhenMissing [ fhir:v "If missing indicates that the described activity is one that should be engaged in when following the plan." ] ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;

fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifierReason [ fhir:v "If true this element negates the specified action. For example, instead of a request for a procedure, it is a request for the procedure to not occur." ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;

fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:endocrineTherapy.detail.description" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.description" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Extra info describing activity to perform" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "This provides a textual description of constraints on the intended activity occurrence, including relation to other activities.  It may also include objectives, pre-conditions and end-conditions.  Finally, it may convey specifics about the activity such as body site, method, route, etc." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.description" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "string"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:string         ]       ] ) ;

fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;

fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "NTE?" ]       ] [

fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:targetedTherapy" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "targetedTherapy" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Action to occur as part of plan" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Identifies a planned action to occur as part of the plan.  For example, a medication to be used, lab tests to perform, self-monitoring, education, etc." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Allows systems to prompt for performance of planned activities, and validate plans against best practice." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;

fhir:code [
fhir:v "BackboneElement"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:BackboneElement         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "cpl-3" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "Provide a reference or detail, not both" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "detail.empty() or reference.empty()" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "not(exists(f:detail)) or not(exists(f:reference))" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/CarePlan"^^xsd:anyURI ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the element and that modifies the understanding of the element in which it is contained and/or the understanding of the containing element's descendants. Usually modifier elements provide negation or qualification. To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension. Applications processing a resource are required to check for modifier extensions.\n\nModifier extensions SHALL NOT change the meaning of any elements on Resource or DomainResource (including cannot change the meaning of modifierExtension itself)." ] ;

The use of extensions is what allows the FHIR specification to retain a core level of simplicity for everyone." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Modifier extensions allow for extensions that *cannot* be safely ignored to be clearly distinguished from the vast majority of extensions which can be safely ignored.  This promotes interoperability by eliminating the need for implementers to prohibit the presence of extensions. For further information, see the [definition of modifier extensions](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/extensibility.html#modifierExtension)." ] ;

fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:targetedTherapy.outcomeCodeableConcept" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.outcomeCodeableConcept" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Results of the activity" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Identifies the outcome at the point when the status of the activity is assessed.  For example, the outcome of an education activity could be patient understands (or not)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Note that this should not duplicate the activity status (e.g. completed or in progress)." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.outcomeCodeableConcept" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;

fhir:code [
fhir:v "CodeableConcept"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:CodeableConcept         ]       ] ) ;

fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;

fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:binding [
        ( fhir:extension [
fhir:url [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName>           ] ;
fhir:value [
a fhir:String ;
fhir:v "CarePlanActivityOutcome"           ]         ] ) ;
fhir:strength [ fhir:v "example" ] ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "Identifies the results of the activity." ] ;
fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/care-plan-activity-outcome|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/care-plan-activity-outcome?version=4.0.1>         ]       ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:targetedTherapy.outcomeReference" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.outcomeReference" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Appointment, Encounter, Procedure, etc." ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Details of the outcome or action resulting from the activity.  The reference to an \"event\" resource, such as Procedure or Encounter or Observation, is the result/outcome of the activity itself.  The activity can be conveyed using CarePlan.activity.detail OR using the CarePlan.activity.reference (a reference to a “request” resource)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The activity outcome is independent of the outcome of the related goal(s).  For example, if the goal is to achieve a target body weight of 150 lbs and an activity is defined to diet, then the activity outcome could be calories consumed whereas the goal outcome is an observation for the actual body weight measured." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Links plan to resulting actions." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.outcomeReference" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;

fhir:code [
fhir:v "Reference"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:Reference         ] ;

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource?version=4.0.1>         ] )       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;

fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "workflow" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "{Event that is outcome of Request in activity.reference}" ]       ] [

fhir:map [ fhir:v ".inboundRelationship[typeCode=FLFS].source" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:targetedTherapy.progress" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.progress" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Comments about the activity status/progress" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Notes about the adherence/status/progress of the activity." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This element should NOT be used to describe the activity to be performed - that occurs either within the resource pointed to by activity.detail.reference or in activity.detail.description." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Can be used to capture information about adherence, progress, concerns, etc." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.progress" ] ;

fhir:code [
fhir:v "Annotation"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:Annotation         ]       ] ) ;

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;

fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".inboundRelationship[typeCode=SUBJ].source[classCode=OBS, moodCode=EVN, code=\"annotation\"].value" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:targetedTherapy.reference" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.reference" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Activity details defined in specific resource" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The details of the proposed activity represented in a specific resource." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Standard extension exists ([resource-pertainsToGoal](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/extension-resource-pertainstogoal.html)) that allows goals to be referenced from any of the referenced resources in CarePlan.activity.reference.  \rThe goal should be visible when the resource referenced by CarePlan.activity.reference is viewed independently from the CarePlan.  Requests that are pointed to by a CarePlan using this element should *not* point to this CarePlan using the \"basedOn\" element.  i.e. Requests that are part of a CarePlan are not \"based on\" the CarePlan." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Details in a form consistent with other applications and contexts of use." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.reference" ] ;

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/CommunicationRequest?version=4.0.1>         ] [

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/DeviceRequest?version=4.0.1>         ] [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/MedicationRequest|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/MedicationRequest?version=4.0.1>         ] [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/NutritionOrder|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/NutritionOrder?version=4.0.1>         ] [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Task|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Task?version=4.0.1>         ] [

fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;

fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:targetedTherapy.detail" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "In-line definition of activity" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A simple summary of a planned activity suitable for a general care plan system (e.g. form driven) that doesn't know about specific resources such as procedure etc." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Details in a simple form for generic care plan systems." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Modifier extensions allow for extensions that *cannot* be safely ignored to be clearly distinguished from the vast majority of extensions which can be safely ignored. fhir:short [ fhir:v "Appointment | CommunicationRequest | DeviceRequest | MedicationRequest | NutritionOrder | Task | ServiceRequest | VisionPrescription" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A description of the kind of resource the in-line definition of a care plan activity is representing.  The CarePlan.activity.detail is an in-line definition when a resource is not referenced using CarePlan.activity.reference.  For example, a MedicationRequest, a ServiceRequest, or a CommunicationRequest." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "May determine what types of extensions are permitted." ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The URL pointing to a FHIR-defined protocol, guideline, questionnaire or other definition that is adhered to in whole or in part by this CarePlan activity." ] ;

fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This might be an HTML page, PDF, etc. or could just be a non-resolvable URI identifier." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Allows Questionnaires that the patient (or practitioner) should fill in to fulfill the care plan activity." ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Detailed description of the type of planned activity; e.g. what lab test, what procedure, what kind of encounter." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Aus dotbase: 'Zielgerichtete Therapie' (choice)" ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Allows matching performed to planned as well as validation against protocols." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.reasonCode" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Why activity should be done or why activity was prohibited" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Provides the rationale that drove the inclusion of this particular activity as part of the plan or the reason why the activity was prohibited." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This could be a diagnosis code.  If a full condition record exists or additional detail is needed, use reasonCondition instead." ] ;

a fhir:String ;

fhir:strength [ fhir:v "example" ] ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "Identifies why a care plan activity is needed.  Can include any health condition codes as well as such concepts as \"general wellness\", prophylaxis, surgical preparation, etc." ] ;
fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/clinical-findings|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/clinical-findings?version=4.0.1>         ]       ] ;

fhir:map [ fhir:v "Request.reasonCode" ]       ] )     ] [

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.reasonReference" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Why activity is needed" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Indicates another resource, such as the health condition(s), whose existence justifies this request and drove the inclusion of this particular activity as part of the plan." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Conditions can be identified at the activity level that are not identified as reasons for the overall plan." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;

fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".outboundRelationship[typeCode<=OBJ]." ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:targetedTherapy.detail.status" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.status" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "not-started | scheduled | in-progress | on-hold | completed | cancelled | stopped | unknown | entered-in-error" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Identifies what progress is being made for the specific activity." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Some aspects of status can be inferred based on the resources linked in actionTaken.  Note that \"status\" is only as current as the plan was most recently updated.  \nThe unknown code is not to be used to convey other statuses.  The unknown code should be used when one of the statuses applies, but the authoring system doesn't know the current state of the activity." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Indicates progress against the plan, whether the activity is still relevant for the plan." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.status" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "code"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:code         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifierReason [ fhir:v "This element is labelled as a modifier because it is a status element that contains status entered-in-error which means that the activity should not be treated as valid" ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:binding [
        ( fhir:extension [
fhir:url [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName>           ] ;
fhir:value [
a fhir:String ;
fhir:v "CarePlanActivityStatus"           ]         ] ) ;
fhir:strength [ fhir:v "required" ] ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "Codes that reflect the current state of a care plan activity within its overall life cycle." ] ;
fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/care-plan-activity-status|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/care-plan-activity-status?version=4.0.1>         ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "workflow" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Request.status" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "ORC-5?" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".statusCode not-started = new scheduled = not-started (and fulfillment relationship to appointent) in-progress = active on-hold = suspended completed = completed cancelled = aborted" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:targetedTherapy.detail.statusReason" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.statusReason" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Reason for current status" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Provides reason why the activity isn't yet started, is on hold, was cancelled, etc." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Will generally not be present if status is \"complete\".  Be sure to prompt to update this (or at least remove the existing value) if the status is changed." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.statusReason" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "CodeableConcept"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:CodeableConcept         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "workflow" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Request.statusReason" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:targetedTherapy.detail.doNotPerform" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.doNotPerform" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "If true, activity is prohibiting action" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "If true, indicates that the described activity is one that must NOT be engaged in when following the plan.  If false, or missing, indicates that the described activity is one that should be engaged in when following the plan." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This element is labeled as a modifier because it marks an activity as an activity that is not to be performed." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Captures intention to not do something that may have been previously typical." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.doNotPerform" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "boolean"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:boolean         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:meaningWhenMissing [ fhir:v "If missing indicates that the described activity is one that should be engaged in when following the plan." ] ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;

fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifierReason [ fhir:v "If true this element negates the specified action. For example, instead of a request for a procedure, it is a request for the procedure to not occur." ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "workflow" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Request.doNotPerform" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "actionNegationInd" ]       ] )     ] [

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The period, timing or frequency upon which the described activity is to occur." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Allows prompting for activities and detection of missed planned activities." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.location" ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Identifies the facility where the activity will occur; e.g. home, hospital, specific clinic, etc." ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "This provides a textual description of constraints on the intended activity occurrence, including relation to other activities. fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:immunotherapy" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity" ] ;
fhir:sliceName [ fhir:v "immunotherapy" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Action to occur as part of plan" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Identifies a planned action to occur as part of the plan.  For example, a medication to be used, lab tests to perform, self-monitoring, education, etc." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Allows systems to prompt for performance of planned activities, and validate plans against best practice." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;

fhir:code [

fhir:l fhir:BackboneElement         ]       ] ) ;

fhir:key [ fhir:v "cpl-3" ] ;

fhir:expression [ fhir:v "detail.empty() or reference.empty()" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "not(exists(f:detail)) or not(exists(f:reference))" ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the element and that modifies the understanding of the element in which it is contained and/or the understanding of the containing element's descendants. Usually modifier elements provide negation or qualification. To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension. Applications processing a resource are required to check for modifier extensions.\n\nModifier extensions SHALL NOT change the meaning of any elements on Resource or DomainResource (including cannot change the meaning of modifierExtension itself)." ] ;

fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Modifier extensions allow for extensions that *cannot* be safely ignored to be clearly distinguished from the vast majority of extensions which can be safely ignored. fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:immunotherapy.outcomeCodeableConcept" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.outcomeCodeableConcept" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Results of the activity" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Identifies the outcome at the point when the status of the activity is assessed.  For example, the outcome of an education activity could be patient understands (or not)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Note that this should not duplicate the activity status (e.g. completed or in progress)." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;

a fhir:String ;
fhir:v "CarePlanActivityOutcome"           ]         ] ) ;
fhir:strength [ fhir:v "example" ] ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "Identifies the results of the activity." ] ;
fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/care-plan-activity-outcome|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/care-plan-activity-outcome?version=4.0.1>         ]       ]     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:immunotherapy.outcomeReference" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.outcomeReference" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Appointment, Encounter, Procedure, etc." ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Details of the outcome or action resulting from the activity.  The reference to an \"event\" resource, such as Procedure or Encounter or Observation, is the result/outcome of the activity itself.  The activity can be conveyed using CarePlan.activity.detail OR using the CarePlan.activity.reference (a reference to a “request” resource)." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "The activity outcome is independent of the outcome of the related goal(s).  For example, if the goal is to achieve a target body weight of 150 lbs and an activity is defined to diet, then the activity outcome could be calories consumed whereas the goal outcome is an observation for the actual body weight measured." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Links plan to resulting actions." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.outcomeReference" ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.progress" ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Notes about the adherence/status/progress of the activity." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This element should NOT be used to describe the activity to be performed - that occurs either within the resource pointed to by activity.detail.reference or in activity.detail.description." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Can be used to capture information about adherence, progress, concerns, etc." ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;

fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:immunotherapy.reference" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.reference" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Activity details defined in specific resource" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "The details of the proposed activity represented in a specific resource." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Standard extension exists ([resource-pertainsToGoal](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/extension-resource-pertainstogoal.html)) that allows goals to be referenced from any of the referenced resources in CarePlan.activity.reference.  \rThe goal should be visible when the resource referenced by CarePlan.activity.reference is viewed independently from the CarePlan.  Requests that are pointed to by a CarePlan using this element should *not* point to this CarePlan using the \"basedOn\" element.  i.e. Requests that are part of a CarePlan are not \"based on\" the CarePlan." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Details in a form consistent with other applications and contexts of use." ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A simple summary of a planned activity suitable for a general care plan system (e.g. form driven) that doesn't know about specific resources such as procedure etc." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Details in a simple form for generic care plan systems." ] ;

fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Modifier extensions allow for extensions that *cannot* be safely ignored to be clearly distinguished from the vast majority of extensions which can be safely ignored. fhir:definition [ fhir:v "A description of the kind of resource the in-line definition of a care plan activity is representing.  The CarePlan.activity.detail is an in-line definition when a resource is not referenced using CarePlan.activity.reference.  For example, a MedicationRequest, a ServiceRequest, or a CommunicationRequest." ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Detailed description of the type of planned activity; e.g. what lab test, what procedure, what kind of encounter." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Aus dotbase: 'Immuntherapie' (choice)" ] ;

fhir:short [ fhir:v "Why activity is needed" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Indicates another resource, such as the health condition(s), whose existence justifies this request and drove the inclusion of this particular activity as part of the plan." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Conditions can be identified at the activity level that are not identified as reasons for the overall plan." ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.status" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "not-started | scheduled | in-progress | on-hold | completed | cancelled | stopped | unknown | entered-in-error" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Identifies what progress is being made for the specific activity." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Some aspects of status can be inferred based on the resources linked in actionTaken.  Note that \"status\" is only as current as the plan was most recently updated.  \nThe unknown code is not to be used to convey other statuses.  The unknown code should be used when one of the statuses applies, but the authoring system doesn't know the current state of the activity." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Indicates progress against the plan, whether the activity is still relevant for the plan." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.status" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "1"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "code"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:code         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifierReason [ fhir:v "This element is labelled as a modifier because it is a status element that contains status entered-in-error which means that the activity should not be treated as valid" ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:binding [
        ( fhir:extension [
fhir:url [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName>           ] ;
fhir:value [
a fhir:String ;
fhir:v "CarePlanActivityStatus"           ]         ] ) ;
fhir:strength [ fhir:v "required" ] ;
fhir:description [ fhir:v "Codes that reflect the current state of a care plan activity within its overall life cycle." ] ;
fhir:valueSet [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/care-plan-activity-status|4.0.1"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/care-plan-activity-status?version=4.0.1>         ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "workflow" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Request.status" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "v2" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "ORC-5?" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v ".statusCode not-started = new scheduled = not-started (and fulfillment relationship to appointent) in-progress = active on-hold = suspended completed = completed cancelled = aborted" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:immunotherapy.detail.statusReason" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.statusReason" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Reason for current status" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Provides reason why the activity isn't yet started, is on hold, was cancelled, etc." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "Will generally not be present if status is \"complete\".  Be sure to prompt to update this (or at least remove the existing value) if the status is changed." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.statusReason" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "CodeableConcept"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:CodeableConcept         ]       ] ) ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v false ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "workflow" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Request.statusReason" ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity:immunotherapy.detail.doNotPerform" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.doNotPerform" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "If true, activity is prohibiting action" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "If true, indicates that the described activity is one that must NOT be engaged in when following the plan.  If false, or missing, indicates that the described activity is one that should be engaged in when following the plan." ] ;
fhir:comment [ fhir:v "This element is labeled as a modifier because it marks an activity as an activity that is not to be performed." ] ;
fhir:requirements [ fhir:v "Captures intention to not do something that may have been previously typical." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "CarePlan.activity.detail.doNotPerform" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [
fhir:v "boolean"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l fhir:boolean         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:meaningWhenMissing [ fhir:v "If missing indicates that the described activity is one that should be engaged in when following the plan." ] ;
      ( fhir:constraint [
fhir:key [ fhir:v "ele-1" ] ;
fhir:severity [ fhir:v "error" ] ;
fhir:human [ fhir:v "All FHIR elements must have a @value or children" ] ;
fhir:expression [ fhir:v "hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())" ] ;
fhir:xpath [ fhir:v "@value|f:*|h:div" ] ;
fhir:source [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element>         ]       ] ) ;
fhir:isModifier [ fhir:v true ] ;
fhir:isModifierReason [ fhir:v "If true this element negates the specified action. For example, instead of a request for a procedure, it is a request for the procedure to not occur." ] ;
fhir:isSummary [ fhir:v false ] ;
      ( fhir:mapping [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "workflow" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "Request.doNotPerform" ]       ] [
fhir:identity [ fhir:v "rim" ] ;
fhir:map [ fhir:v "actionNegationInd" ]       ] )     ] [
